case_title: NATALIA KRUEGER VS. URBAN MAPPING, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-17-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRUEGER, NATALIA AS TO DEFENDANT URBAN MAPPING, INC. WHITE, IAN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY DEFENDANT URBAN MAPPING, INC. WHITE, IAN

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS URBAN MAPPING, INC. AND IAN WHITE'S MOTION FOR ORDER STRIKING PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT; PRAYER NO. 3 ( FOR ATTY'S FEE) IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED A STATUTORY BASIS FOR ATTORNEY FEES PURSUANT TO LABOR CODE 218.5. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT DEFENDANTS FAILED TO PAY HER WAGES SHE EARNED AS AN EMPLOYEE, INCLUDING PTO AND OTHER BENEFITS PROVIDED TO OTHER EMPLOYEES. (SEE FAC, 27 - 29.) TO THE EXTENT THAT DEFENDANTS ATTACK THE SUFFICIENCY OF THE ALLEGATIONS OF THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION, THIS IS NOT THE PROPER SUBJECT OF A MOTION TO STRIKE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

THE AMENDED PLEADING, IF ANY, MUST BE FILED/SERVED BY JANUARY 11, 2013. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD #7077.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Striking Pltf'S First Amended Complaint; Prayer No. 3
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS URBAN MAPPING, INC. and IAN WHITE'S Motion For Order Striking Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint; Prayer No. 3 ( FOR ATTY'S FEE) is Denied. Plaintiff has pled a statutory basis for attorney fees pursuant to Labor Code 218.5. Plaintiff alleges that Defendants failed to pay her wages she earned as an employee, including PTO and other benefits provided to other employees. (See FAC, 27 - 29.) To the extent that Defendants attack the sufficiency of the allegations of the fourth cause of action, this is not the proper subject of a motion to strike. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Striking Pltf'S First Amended Complaint; Prayer No. 3
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Continued To Feb-26-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Continued To Apr-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Mtn For Order Striking Pltf'S Prayer No. 3
Off Calendar Dec-17-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Diedre Kingsbury, Esq., 707.545.7010, for plaintiff Natalia Krueger.
Margaret Murray, Esq., 415.585.5400, for defendants Urban Mapping, Inc. and Ian White.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling with modification: DEFENDANTS URBAN MAPPING, INC. and IAN WHITE'S Motion For Order Striking Plaintiff's Prayer No. 3 is granted with leave to amend for Plaintiff to plead a contractual or statutory basis for its prayer for attorney's fees. The amended pleading, if any, must be filed/served by January 11, 2013. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward #7077.
